tabs.files.label: 文件
settings.edit.mode.label: 编辑模式
settings.edit.fuzzyMatch.label: 模糊匹配
settings.edit.fuzzyMatch.description: 接受高置信度模糊匹配处理空白差异
settings.edit.fuzzyThreshold.label: 模糊匹配阈值
settings.edit.fuzzyThreshold.description: 接受模糊匹配的相似度阈值（0-1）
settings.edit.streamingAbort.label: 预览失败时中止
settings.edit.streamingAbort.description: 补丁预览失败时中止流式编辑工具调用
settings.edit.blockAutoGenerated.label: 屏蔽自动生成的文件
settings.edit.blockAutoGenerated.descrip: 阻止编辑看起来是自动生成的文件
settings.readLineNumbers.label: 行号
settings.readLineNumbers.description: 默认在 read 工具输出前加行号
settings.read.defaultLimit.label: 默认读取限制
settings.read.defaultLimit.description: 默认 number of 行 returned when agent calls read without a limit
settings.read.summarize.enabled.label: 读取摘要
settings.read.summarize.enabled.descript: read 无显式选择器时返回代码结构摘要
settings.read.summarize.prose.label: 散文摘要
settings.read.summarize.prose.descriptio: read Markdown 和纯文本时返回结构摘要
settings.read.summarize.minBodyLines.des: 最小 multiline body or literal length before read summaries collapse it
最小 multiline block comment length before read summaries collapse it
settings.read.summarize.minTotalLines.de: 文件 with fewer total 行 are read verbatim instead of structurally summarized
settings.read.summarize.unfoldUntil.desc: BFS-unfold elidable spans until the summary is at least this many visible 行. 0 keeps only the outermost elisions.
settings.read.summarize.unfoldLimit.desc: Hard ceiling on summary size while BFS-unfolding. An unfold whose revealed 行 would exceed this is skipped (that span stays folded) and unfolding continues with the remaining spans.
settings.read.toolResultPreview.label: 内联读取预览
settings.read.toolResultPreview.descript: 在对话记录中内联渲染 read 工具结果
settings.lsp.enabled.label: 语言服务器
settings.lsp.enabled.description: 启用 the lsp tool for code intelligence (definitions, references, diagnostics, rename)
settings.lsp.lazy.label: 延迟 LSP 启动
settings.lsp.lazy.description: 首次使用时启动语言服务器，而非会话启动时
settings.lsp.formatOnWrite.label: 写入时格式化
settings.lsp.formatOnWrite.description: 自动matically format code files using LSP after writing
settings.lsp.diagnosticsOnWrite.label: 写入时诊断
settings.lsp.diagnosticsOnWrite.descript: 写入代码文件后返回 LSP 诊断
settings.lsp.diagnosticsOnEdit.label: 编辑时诊断
settings.lsp.diagnosticsOnEdit.descripti: 编辑代码文件后返回 LSP 诊断
settings.lsp.diagnosticsDeduplicate.desc: 抑制已显示过的编辑后诊断，仅展示新增或变更的
